## What

One-line summary of the change.

## Why

The motivation — bug being fixed, feature being added, refactor being made.
Link to the issue if there is one (`Closes #N`).

## Checklist

- [ ] `pnpm ci` passes locally (lint + typecheck + build + test)
- [ ] New user-visible behavior has a test
- [ ] New flex algorithm behavior has an oracle fixture in
      `packages/core/test/yoga-oracle.test.ts`
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated if the change affects a published package
